description: RapidAPI (now Nokia API Hub) is an API marketplace for discovering, publishing, and managing thousands of APIs.
overview: RapidAPI, now Nokia API Hub, is a large public API marketplace where developers and enterprises discover, test, publish, and integrate APIs, including many data and enrichment APIs.
what_is: RapidAPI, now Nokia API Hub, is a large public API marketplace for discovering, publishing, and using APIs. It connects developers and enterprises to a catalog of more than 94,000 APIs, with discovery features that help users find and start integrating the right ones quickly.

It is most useful when teams want to streamline API consumption or create new revenue by publishing their own APIs, including data and enrichment APIs used in go-to-market workflows. It is built for API discovery and integration rather than full API lifecycle management.
